title: Bulbophyllum frappieri
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum frappieri is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Bulbophyllum. Within the genus, it is classified as a terrestrial orchid. The species is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. It is further categorized as Bulbophyllum frappieri by taxonomists due to its unique characteristics.

The potential benefits of Bulbophyllum frappieri in treating diseases are still largely speculative.
